narrative:
Cherry Valley Twp township has 453 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
